description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Node.js CI Windows Platform that runs on push and pull request events. Set up a test job with a 30-minute timeout, using a matrix strategy to test multiple Node.js versions (18.x, 20.x, 22.x) and architectures (x64, x86) on Windows 2019 and Windows 2022. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.11 and the specified Node.js version, verify the Node.js installation, install dependencies with npm, and run npm tests.
